Getting the opurtunity to make custom records for people using the skills and knowledge Ive gathered through my experiences. Hopefully I can make one for you."

Orville Peck.action: Sequence advanced → Follow-up DM due Mar 1, 26

savedTemplates.name: Greg template
savedTemplates.subject: Quick idea for Orville Peck
savedTemplates.body:
Hey team,

Greg here, Head of Content & Partnerships at Songfinch. Long time listener, I love what Orville has been creating - so I just wanted to connect about something we have in motion.  At songfinch, We help artists build a paid direct to fan environment where top fans and potential super fans commission and create one-of-one songs directly with the artist. 

Quick context: $50M+ paid out since 2020. No contracts, no exclusivity, no AI-generated music, and no cost to join. Artists set pricing, accept only the requests they want, and keep ownership. And best of all, it really acts as a creative exercise: You can use the songs however you want, the customer use case is extremely limited, and essential fans are paying to have an inside look on the creation process. 

I'd love to connect - would you have 15 minutes to chat this or next week about how it works and to answer any questions?

Thanks for your time, 
Greg
Head of Content & Partnerships, Songfinch
Greg@songfinch.com
